text:
For purposes of this chapter, a motor vehicle liability insurance policy must be an owner’s or operator’s policy that:

(1) except as provided by Section 601.083 (Certificate of Motor Vehicle Liability Insurance) , is issued by an insurance company authorized to write motor vehicle liability insurance in this state;

(2) is written to or for the benefit of the person named in the policy as the insured; and

(3) meets the requirements of this subchapter.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 601. Motor Vehicle Safety Responsibility Act
##### § 601.071 — Motor Vehicle Liability Insurance; Requirements

For purposes of this chapter, a motor vehicle liability insurance policy must be an owner’s or operator’s policy that:

    (1) except as provided by Section 601.083 (Certificate of Motor Vehicle Liability Insurance) , is issued by an insurance company authorized to write motor vehicle liability insurance in this state;

    (2) is written to or for the benefit of the person named in the policy as the insured; and

    (3) meets the requirements of this subchapter.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: For purposes of this chapter, a motor vehicle liability insurance policy must be an owner’s or operator’s policy that:
except as provided by Section 601.083 (Certificate of Motor Vehicle Liability Insurance) , is issued by an insurance company authorized to write motor vehicle liability insurance in this state;
is written to or for the benefit of the person named in the policy as the insured; and
meets the requirements of this subchapter.
